title: Dense Lazy Mediterranean lamb Tagine
description: A tangy and dense Mediterranean dish featuring lamb, bay leaves, and shio-cure, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This satvik-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb pieces with salt, black pepper, and shio-cure.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces to the pot and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the dried bay leaves, chopped dried apricots, prunes, and lemon juice to the pot.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2.5 hours, or until it is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
